overall.description: Gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man featuring Miles Morales web-swinging through a snow-covered New York City. The character traverses between modern glass skyscrapers in a winter storm, descending from high altitude into a Times Square-like district filled with bright digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: wall-running up the side of a glass skyscraper while looking toward the Oscorp tower in the distance

entered.detail: reflective glass surface of the building the character is climbing
tall cylindrical skyscraper with Oscorp logo visible on the side
heavy falling snow visible throughout the air

segments.scene_description: The character is wall-running up the side of a modern glass skyscraper in heavy snowfall. The Oscorp tower looms in the distance against an overcast winter sky, with snow particles filling the air between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of snow-covered urban park

events.description: character looks down from the skyscraper edge toward the snowy park and streets below
character leaps off the building into free fall, beginning the descent

agents.ego_description: pausing at the building edge to look down at the snowy cityscape before jumping off

entered.detail: snow-covered park with bare trees visible far below between buildings
cluster of tall buildings surrounding the park area

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the edge of the skyscraper to look down at a snow-covered urban park far below, surrounded by a forest of skyscrapers. After a brief moment, the character leaps off the building into open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude web-swinging corridor between skyscrapers

events.description: character shoots web line and begins swinging between buildings
approaching Times Square district with digital billboards becoming visible on buildings

agents.ego_description: rapidly swinging between skyscrapers on webs, descending through the city while navigating around buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
building covered in multiple digital screens and advertisements
classic stepped architecture skyscraper with ornate details

segments.scene_description: The character swings rapidly between skyscrapers using webs, descending through a canyon of glass and steel buildings. Snow continues to fall as the character approaches a dense commercial district with bright digital billboards becoming visible on the building faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square commercial district with dense digital advertisements

events.description: entering the dense Times Square area surrounded by towering digital billboards on all sides
swinging lower through the street canyon, closer to pedestrian and vehicle level

agents.ego_description: swinging through the narrow canyon of Times Square, weaving between buildings covered in massive LED advertisements and digital screens

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying a golden statue figure
multiple bright digital billboards showing various advertisements
small figures of people visible walking on the snowy streets below

segments.scene_description: The character swings through the dense urban canyon of Times Square, surrounded on all sides by towering buildings covered in massive glowing digital billboards and LED screens. The altitude drops lower, bringing the snowy streets, pedestrians, and vehicles into clearer view as the character navigates between the advertisement-covered towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the heights of a snowy skyscraper into the neon-lit depths of a bustling commercial district. It begins with a wall-run up a modern glass tower amidst heavy snowfall, with the Oscorp tower looming against an overcast winter sky. As the character reaches the edge and pauses to overlook a snow-covered urban park far below, the camera follows a sudden leap into the open air. The scene then shifts into a rapid descent through a canyon of glass and steel, where the gray winter atmosphere gradually gives way to the glow of distant digital billboards. Finally, the camera plunges into the heart of Times Square, navigating between towering LED screens as the altitude drops to reveal snowy streets filled with pedestrians and vehicles.
